Bash(# Check latest swarm status again after a couple minutes
curl -s http://localhost:8000/swarm/status 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Uptime: {d[\\"status\\"]} | Ticks: {d[\\"tick_count\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Tasks done: {d[\\"tasks_completed\\"]} | Failed: {d[\\"tasks_failed\\"]} | Pending: {d[\\"coordinator\\"][\\"available_tasks\\"]}'\)
print\(\)
for w in d['workers']:
    task = w.get\('current_task'\) or 'idle'
    if isinstance\(task, dict\): task = task.get\('title', str\(task\)\)[:60]
    print\(f'  {w[\\"name\\"]:12} done={w[\\"tasks_completed\\"]} | {task}'\)
print\(\)
# Check recent tasks for token/cost info
recent = d.get\('recent_tasks',[]\)
if recent:
    print\('Last 5 tasks:'\)
    for t in recent[-5:]:
        print\(f'  [{\\"OK\\" if t[\\"success\\"] else \\"FAIL\\"}] {t[\\"worker\\"]}: {t[\\"task\\"][:50]} | {t[\\"duration_s\\"]:.1f}s | \\${t[\\"cost_usd\\"]:.4f} | tokens={t[\\"tokens\\"]}'\)
# Budget line
for line in d['report'].split\(chr\(10\)\):
    if 'Session:' in line or 'Daily:' in line:
        print\(line.strip\(\)\)
" 2>/dev/null)
